title: Reports: Ayo Dosunmu to re-sign with Timberwolves
summary: NBA.com media reports, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and the St. Paul Pioneer-Press, said Dosunmu intends to return to Minnesota on a five-year, $112 million deal with a player option in the fifth season.

title: Reports: Heat acquire Giannis Antetokounmpo in blockbuster deal
summary: The Associated Press reported that Miami is acquiring Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bobby Portis from Milwaukee for Tyler Herro, Kel'el Ware, Jaime Jaquez Jr., Kasparas Jakucionis and multiple draft assets.

title: Reports: Julius Randle traded to Nets on eve of draft
summary: The Associated Press reported that Minnesota will send Julius Randle and the No. 28 pick to Brooklyn, Chicago will receive Nic Claxton and the Timberwolves will move back to No. 33.

title: Prospects, pundits lock in ahead of NBA Draft
summary: NBA.com's media-day roundup focused on AJ Dybantsa and the rest of the projected top prospects as teams and analysts locked in their final views before Round 1 on June 23.

title: 4 takeaways: Draft prospects meet with the media before 2026 NBA Draft
summary: Shaun Powell's NBA.com notebook highlighted the 2026 class' guard depth, the Wizards' spotlight on AJ Dybantsa and the chance that late deals could still reshape Round 1.

title: Reports: Trae Young, Wizards agree to 4-year deal
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and The Athletic's Josh Robbins, reported that Young will remain in Washington on a four-year, approximately $212 million deal with a player option in Year 4.

title: Reports: Mavs to hire Michigan's Dusty May as coach
summary: NBA.com, citing multiple reports, said Dallas is finalizing a deal with May after he led Michigan to the 2026 NCAA title, giving the Mavericks a new head coach.

title: 2026 NBA Draft News & Notes
summary: The league's official media guide notes emphasized Washington's No. 1 pick, the June 23-24 draft schedule and historical context for this year's first selection.

title: Reports: Suns plan to re-sign Collin Gillespie, Jordan Goodwin
summary: NBA.com, citing multiple reports, said Phoenix plans to bring back both reserve guards on new multi-year deals for the 2026-27 season.

title: Reports: Hawks agree to deal with CJ McCollum
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and The Athletic, reported that Atlanta will keep McCollum on a one-year, $21 million extension after his late-season impact.

title: Reports: Hawks acquire Aaron Wiggins from Thunder
summary: NBA.com, citing ESPN's Shams Charania and The Athletic, reported that Atlanta will acquire Wiggins from Oklahoma City for two future second-round picks.

title: Suns' All-Star guard Devin Booker changes jersey number to No. 15 in honor of his dad Melvin
summary: Phoenix announced that Booker will switch from No. 1 to No. 15 for 2026-27, honoring his father Melvin Booker and the family number he previously wore with Team USA.

title: Wizards' Alex Sarr broke right foot in offseason workout but is expected to recover before next season
summary: Washington announced Alex Sarr underwent surgery to repair a broken right foot suffered in an offseason workout and is expected back before next season.
